title: Enhanced Operator Utilities
description: A clean expansion for the Creative Inventory that unlocks hidden items and organizes utility blocks, paintings, and boss eggs into better-structured tabs.
body:
## Description Stop memorizing commands. Enhanced Operator Utilities reveals hidden technical items and blocks that are usually only obtainable via `/give`. While vanilla Minecraft includes a basic Operator tab, this mod expands it significantly to include technical blocks, boss eggs, and unique item variants. ### Features * **Expanded Operator Catalog** – Gain access to items missing from the vanilla Operator tab, such as Painting variants, Boss spawn eggs, and uncraftable potions. * **Streamlined Organization** – Keep your Creative menu clean by moving cluttered items (potions, enchanted books, etc.) into dedicated, logical tabs. * **Fully Customizable** – Take total control over item placement. Use the configuration to move items to the Operator tab, a custom "Enhanced Misc" tab, or maintain their vanilla categories. * **Builder-Focused** – Simple, lightweight, and essential for map makers who need fast access to every asset in the game. ## Compatibility
Category Support
MC Versions 1.21.x, 26.1.x
Maintenance Latest version only (26.1.x)
Loaders Fabric (Official), Quilt (Compatible)
## Dependencies
